name: Suijinmon

signature_move.name: Mugen Cannon
signature_move.description: Fires superdreadnought-class energy waves from its two cannons.

description: A Machine Digimon that possesses parts from both Justimon and Mugendramon . While the reason why these parts are being used is unknown, there is no doubt that it has great combat strength. Its Special Moves are " Accel Arm ", where it grips and crushes the enemy with its power-type arm, and " Mugen Cannon ", a technique shared with Mugendramon.
